entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet

[DQC.US.0048.7482] The filing should include in the cash flow statement calculation linkbase(s) http://euro-tech.com/role/ConsolidatedStatementsOfCashFlows one of the following elements as the root(first element) of the calculation tree to represent the aggregate change in cash for the period:
CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffect, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffect, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffectContinuingOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffectContinuingOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffectDisposalGroupIncludingDiscontinuedOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffectDisposalGroupIncludingDiscontinuedOperations NetCashProvidedByUsedInContinuingOperations (As long as the element NetCashProvidedByUsedInDiscontinuedOperations is also included the reconciliation between opening and closing cash).
The calculation linkbase in the filing has the following root elements defined: us-gaap:StatementOfCashFlowsAbstract.
Rule Element Id: 7482 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2024/elts/us-gaap-2024.xsd 6720

[DQC.US.0048.7482] The filing should include in the cash flow statement calculation linkbase(s) http://euro-tech.com/role/ConsolidatedStatementsOfCashFlows one of the following elements as the root(first element) of the calculation tree to represent the aggregate change in cash for the period:
CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffect, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffect, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffectContinuingOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffectContinuingOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffectDisposalGroupIncludingDiscontinuedOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffectDisposalGroupIncludingDiscontinuedOperations NetCashProvidedByUsedInContinuingOperations (As long as the element NetCashProvidedByUsedInDiscontinuedOperations is also included the reconciliation between opening and closing cash).
The calculation linkbase in the filing has the following root elements defined: srt:ConsolidatedEntitiesAxis.
Rule Element Id: 7482 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2024/elts/us-gaap-2024.xsd 6720

[DQC.US.0048.7482] The filing should include in the cash flow statement calculation linkbase(s) http://euro-tech.com/role/ConsolidatedStatementsOfCashFlows one of the following elements as the root(first element) of the calculation tree to represent the aggregate change in cash for the period:
CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffect, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffect, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffectContinuingOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffectContinuingOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffectDisposalGroupIncludingDiscontinuedOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffectDisposalGroupIncludingDiscontinuedOperations NetCashProvidedByUsedInContinuingOperations (As long as the element NetCashProvidedByUsedInDiscontinuedOperations is also included the reconciliation between opening and closing cash).
The calculation linkbase in the filing has the following root elements defined: us-gaap:StatementLineItems.
Rule Element Id: 7482 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2024/elts/us-gaap-2024.xsd 6720

[DQC.US.0048.7482] The filing should include in the cash flow statement calculation linkbase(s) http://euro-tech.com/role/ConsolidatedStatementsOfCashFlows one of the following elements as the root(first element) of the calculation tree to represent the aggregate change in cash for the period:
CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffect, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffect, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffectContinuingOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffectContinuingOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffectDisposalGroupIncludingDiscontinuedOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffectDisposalGroupIncludingDiscontinuedOperations NetCashProvidedByUsedInContinuingOperations (As long as the element NetCashProvidedByUsedInDiscontinuedOperations is also included the reconciliation between opening and closing cash).
The calculation linkbase in the filing has the following root elements defined: us-gaap:StatementTable.
Rule Element Id: 7482 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2024/elts/us-gaap-2024.xsd 6720

[DQC.US.0048.7482] The filing should include in the cash flow statement calculation linkbase(s) http://euro-tech.com/role/ConsolidatedStatementsOfCashFlows one of the following elements as the root(first element) of the calculation tree to represent the aggregate change in cash for the period:
CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffect, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffect, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffectContinuingOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffectContinuingOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffectDisposalGroupIncludingDiscontinuedOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffectDisposalGroupIncludingDiscontinuedOperations NetCashProvidedByUsedInContinuingOperations (As long as the element NetCashProvidedByUsedInDiscontinuedOperations is also included the reconciliation between opening and closing cash).
The calculation linkbase in the filing has the following root elements defined: us-gaap:StatementLineItems, srt:ConsolidatedEntitiesDomain.
Rule Element Id: 7482 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2024/elts/us-gaap-2024.xsd 6720

[DQC.US.0048.7482] The filing should include in the cash flow statement calculation linkbase(s) http://euro-tech.com/role/ConsolidatedStatementsOfCashFlows one of the following elements as the root(first element) of the calculation tree to represent the aggregate change in cash for the period:
CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffect, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffect, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffectContinuingOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffectContinuingOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffectDisposalGroupIncludingDiscontinuedOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffectDisposalGroupIncludingDiscontinuedOperations NetCashProvidedByUsedInContinuingOperations (As long as the element NetCashProvidedByUsedInDiscontinuedOperations is also included the reconciliation between opening and closing cash).
The calculation linkbase in the filing has the following root elements defined: srt:ConsolidatedEntitiesAxis.
Rule Element Id: 7482 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2024/elts/us-gaap-2024.xsd 6720
